app.name: Prompteer
app.tagline: Practice prompts, compare outputs, and learn from shared challenge runs.

home.title: Prompt challenge workspace
home.subtitle: Sign in with seeded demo users, run a coding prompt challenge, and complete a local checkout without external credentials.

login.title: Demo login
login.description: Enter through mock Google OAuth with admin, paid, or free seed accounts.

coding.title: Coding workspace
coding.description: Draft and run deterministic prompt feedback against seeded PS challenges.

board.title: Review board
board.description: Scan seeded questions and public prompt shares from demo users.

billing.title: Billing checkout
billing.description: Create and complete a Stripe-shaped subscription checkout for the signed-in demo account.

billing.title: Subscription checkout
billing.description: Start a Pro checkout session for the signed-in demo account. Local mocks complete in-app; real Stripe sessions open hosted Checkout.

plan.name: Prompteer Pro
plan.description: Use the active demo account with a Stripe-shaped checkout session, local webhook completion, and deterministic subscription state.

checkout.title: Checkout session
checkout.readyDescription: A local Stripe-compatible session is ready.
checkout.hostedDescription: A hosted Stripe Checkout Session is ready. Open it to continue payment on Stripe.
checkout.createDescription: Create a session for the signed-in demo user.
checkout.disabledNotice: Checkout is disabled by the environment feature flags.
checkout.completed: Subscription active for {email}. The mock session completed with a Stripe-compatible <event>checkout.session.completed</event> event.

errors.disabled: Payments are disabled for this environment.
errors.rateLimited: Checkout is temporarily rate limited. Wait a moment, then try again.
errors.startFailed: Checkout could not be started. Check that the API server is running.
errors.completeFailed: Mock checkout could not be completed.

board.title: Shared prompt reviews
board.description: Review seeded questions and public prompt shares from the demo challenge workspace.

coding.title: Prompt repair workspace
coding.description: Pick a seeded coding challenge, draft a prompt, and run it through the local LLM mock.

runner.defaultPrompt: Explain the FizzBuzz rules first, then produce concise Python with clear edge cases.
runner.emptyDescriptionBefore: No coding challenges are available yet. Run
runner.publishDescription: Save this run as a public prompt share for the review board.
runner.disabledNotice: Prompt runs are disabled by the environment feature flags.
runner.emptyResult: Run a prompt to see deterministic feedback from the local LLM mock.

errors.disabled: Prompt runs are disabled for this environment.
errors.noChallenge: Choose a challenge before running a prompt.
errors.shortPrompt: Write a prompt with at least 10 characters.
errors.rateLimited: Prompt runs are temporarily rate limited. Wait a moment, then try again.
errors.unauthorized: Sign in before running a prompt.
errors.failed: The prompt run failed. Check that the API server and seed data are running.

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.description: Review the active demo account, feature availability, and local mock integration state.
profile.signedOutTitle: Sign in to view profile settings
profile.signedOutDescription: Use the mock Google login flow to inspect seeded account settings and integration status.

account.title: Demo account
account.description: The current Auth.js session is issued by the web app and accepted by FastAPI through RS256 JWT validation.
account.name: Name

features.title: Feature availability
features.description: These switches are read from the API feature endpoint and disable cost-sensitive flows without redeploying.

integrations.title: Integration mode
integrations.description: Blank credentials keep local development on deterministic mocks.

security.title: Session security
security.description: Auth tokens stay in HTTP-only Auth.js cookies. Browser API calls are proxied through Next.js and forwarded to FastAPI with short-lived bearer tokens.

shortcuts.title: Developer shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Jump into the seeded demo flows without touching external credentials.
